sourcesContent:
import {React, useEffect, useState} from 'react' import axios from 'axios' export default function Cart() { const [counter, setCounter] = useState(0) const [cart, setCart] = useState([]) useEffect(() => { getData() } , []) const getData = async() => { const res = await axios.get('http://localhost:1700/backend/cart') setCart(res.data) } const handleDeleteCartItem = async(id) => { await axios.delete(`http://localhost:1700/backend/cart/${id}`) getData() } const handlePlaceOrder = async() => { const items = cart.map((obj) => ({ "product_id": obj.product_id, "price": obj.price, "quantity": obj.quantity })) const payload = { "total_items" : totalItems, "amount": totalAmount, "discount": countDiscount, "coupons": 100, "delivery_charges": 'free', "total_amount": finalAmount, "total_discount": savedAmount, items } const res = await axios.post("http://localhost:1700/backend/masterorder", payload) console.log(res.data) } const AddValue = (id) => { setCart(prev => prev.map(item => item.product_id === id ? {...item, "quantity": item.quantity + 1} : item)) } const removeValue = (id) => { setCart(prev => prev.map(item => item.product_id === id && item.quantity > 0 ? {...item, "quantity": item.quantity - 1} : item)) } const totalItems = cart.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.quantity , 0) const totalAmount = cart.reduce((sum , item) => sum + (item.price * item.quantity), 0) const countDiscount = cart.reduce((sum, item) => sum + (item.price * item.quantity * (item.offer / 100)), 0) const finalAmount = totalAmount - countDiscount - 100 const savedAmount = totalAmount - finalAmount return (
Your Cart
{/*
Deliver to: Shivaji Circle, Bhavnagar, Gujarat
*/} {cart.map((obj) => (

{obj.product_name}

Rs {obj.price}/- {obj.offer}% off
))}
Price Details
Price ({totalItems} items) Rs {totalAmount}/-
Discount -Rs {countDiscount.toFixed(2)}/-
Coupons for you -Rs 100
Delivery Charges Free
Total Amount Rs {finalAmount}/-
You save {savedAmount.toFixed(2)} in this order!
) }
